types:type.name: auto_b0c599c1-6e3f-4e75-bc50-7b94d3a136f1_Input-Attributes

%dw 2.0
type auto_b0c599c1_6e3f_4e75_bc50_7b94d3a136f1_Input_Attributes = {| clientCertificate?: {| publicKey?: {| |}, "type"?: String, encoded?: Binary |}, headers: {| client_id: String, client_secret: String |}, listenerPath: String, method: String, queryParams: {| |}, queryString: String, relativePath: String, remoteAddress: String, requestPath: String, requestUri: String, scheme: String, uriParams: {| |}, version: String, localAddress: String |}

types:type.name: auto_b0c599c1-6e3f-4e75-bc50-7b94d3a136f1_Output-Payload
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type auto_b0c599c1_6e3f_4e75_bc50_7b94d3a136f1_Output_Payload = { dateTime: String, data?: {| recordCount: Number, customers: Array<{| companyCode?: String, taxNumber1?: String, taxNumber2?: String, city?: String, postalCode?: String, accountGroup?: String, nameLine1: String, nameLine2?: String, sapCustomerNumber: String, salesOrganization?: String, division?: String, deletionFlag?: Boolean, emailAddress?: String, searchTerm?: String, phoneNumber?: String, createdDate?: String, streetAddress?: String, createdBy?: String, countryCode?: String, centralPostingBlock?: Boolean, distributionChannel?: String, region?: String, lastChangedDate?: String |} {"label": "SAP ECC Customer", "description": "SAP ECC-aligned representation of a customer record. Field names are human-readable, but the
model remains aligned to SAP ECC customer master concepts rather than the enterprise canonical
customer model.
"}> {"label": "SAP ECC Customer Collection", "description": "Customer records retrieved from SAP ECC."} |} {"description": "SAP ECC customer retrieval payload returned in the standard response envelope.", "label": "SAP ECC Customer Get Data"}, httpStatus: Number, correlationId?: String, details?: Array<{ severity: "ERROR" | "INFO" | "WARNING", code?: String, message: String, target?: String, _?: Any } {"description": "Structured detail message returned by the API.

Detail messages provide additional actionable information such as validation failures, skipped
records, unsupported values, or other context that helps the client understand the outcome
without changing the top-level response message.
", "label": "Response detail"}> {"description": "Optional list of structured detail messages that provide additional context,
such as validation failures, warnings, or informational notes.
"}, message: String, status: "SUCCESS" | "ERROR" | "WARNING", _?: Any } {"label": "Get SAP ECC Customers Response", "description": "Standard API response envelope with an SAP ECC customer retrieval payload."}

Field names are human-readable, but the
model remains aligned to SAP ECC customer master concepts rather than the enterprise canonical
customer model.
"}> {"description": "Collection of SAP ECC customer records.", "label": "SAP ECC Customer Collection"}
